attributes.description: Alerts when outbound network bytes exceed a threshold over the lookback window, indicating high egress traffic or potential saturation relative to instance network limits.
attributes.name: [AWS EC2 OTel] High network egress

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-aws.ec2.otel-*
| WHERE attributes.Namespace == "AWS/EC2"
    AND attributes.MetricName == "NetworkOut"
    AND attributes.stat == "Sum"
| EVAL ec2_instance = CONCAT(attributes.InstanceId, " (", resource.attributes.cloud.region, ")")
| STATS total_bytes_out = SUM(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkOut`) BY ec2_instance
// Bytes threshold: tune per instance size and baseline — Sum stat is bytes per CloudWatch period
| WHERE total_bytes_out > 1073741824
| SORT total_bytes_out DESC
| LIMIT 100
